query:
SELECT 
  'viral_examples' as table_name,
  COUNT(*) as total_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT keyword) as unique_keywords,
  AVG(likes) as avg_likes,
  MAX(likes) as max_likes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isTop200 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as top200_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isTop20 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as top20_count
FROM viral_examples;
